task_statement: P4 of BRICK 6-surface audit repair: close AgentFact pre-persistence gap. Chat-session submission intake must reject AgentFact-forbidden top-level authority keys (movement/status/success/target/verdict/result/etc.) before submission.json is written; nested ordinary evidence keys must remain legal; a poisoned submission must not create a write-exclusive resume wedge. Preserve AgentFact shape as received_work + returned and do not let support invent success/quality/Movement verdicts.
selection_rule: manual graph because P4 crosses AgentFact contract, chat-session support intake, and checker wedge prevention; no preset is assumed adequate.

nodes.work_statement:
Prepare the P4 design split. Read only the P4 phase doc plus cited audit refs and current AgentFact/chat-session/checker surfaces needed for P4. Return invariant map and dispatch notes for independent design lanes. Do not edit files.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P4 only. Do not broaden into P5-P8, P3 return-shape carry, release/dashboard/provider/pytest honesty, raw scrub, or post-HOLD resume isolation beyond the poisoned chat-session submission wedge named by P4. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Keep public/operator language build()/brick build only. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Codex design lane for P4. Derive repair design from phase doc and live code. Must cover: (1) AgentFact TOP_LEVEL_VERDICT_KEYS / ALWAYS_SECRET_KEYS are rejected at chat-session submission pre-persistence; (2) validator is top-level-only for verdict keys, recursive only for secret/session text; (3) nested ordinary status/result/target data remains legal when required return fields are present; (4) poisoned submission.json does not get written and cannot wedge resume; (5) focused checker/profile and check_profile.py --all plan. Return design only.

Required outcomes: chat-session submission pre-persistence rejects top-level AgentFact forbidden authority keys before submission.json is written; nested ordinary keys such as returned.observed_evidence[0].status or returned.evidence.result remain legal; poisoned submission cannot create a write-exclusive resume wedge; AgentFact remains received_work + returned; support creates no success/quality/Movement verdict. Likely surfaces: support/operator/run_chat_session.py, support/operator/run.py if needed, support/operator/primitives.py only if needed, agent/return_fact.py only to reuse/export exact top-level validator if needed, support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py and relevant profile admission. Run focused chat-session checker/profile, py_compile changed Python, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all if feasible. If any implementation gap remains, return transition_concern_evidence targeting this work node.

proof_limits: official build evidence is support evidence only
P4 closure does not prove P5-P8 or customer-ready whole goal
multi-adapter preflight/version evidence does not prove provider semantic quality or credential validity
checker green is support evidence only
not_proven: semantic completeness of all future chat-session payload schemas
